title: rubus oleifluus
intro: Rubus oleifluus, also known as the Japanese dewberry or Japanese dewy berry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus oleifluus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rubus oleifluus is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
